'''dabodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycothrix|mycothrix]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycothrix|mycothrix]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dabodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæbedeth|dæbedeth]] || [[word:dæbedej|dæbedej]] || [[word:dæbedesh|dæbedesh]] || [[word:dæbede|dæbede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dabobodoth|dabobodoth]] || [[word:dabobodoj|dabobodoj]] || [[word:dabobodosh|dabobodosh]] || [[word:dabobodo|dabobodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dabodoth|dabodoth]] || [[word:dabodoj|dabodoj]] || [[word:dabodosh|dabodosh]] || [[word:dabodo|dabodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dabofdoth|dabofdoth]] || [[word:dabofdoj|dabofdoj]] || [[word:dabofdosh|dabofdosh]] || [[word:dabofdof|dabofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dabodotho|dabodotho]] || [[word:dabodojo|dabodojo]] || [[word:dabodosho|dabodosho]] || [[word:dabodoko|dabodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dabodoth|dabodoth]] || [[word:dabodoj|dabodoj]] || [[word:dabodosh|dabodosh]] || [[word:dabodo|dabodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dabodothol|dabodothol]] || [[word:dabodojol|dabodojol]] || [[word:dabodoshol|dabodoshol]] || [[word:dabodokol|dabodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dabodothotho|dabodothotho]] || [[word:dabodojojo|dabodojojo]] || [[word:dabodoshosho|dabodoshosho]] || [[word:dabodoko|dabodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dabodothon|dabodothon]] || [[word:dabodojon|dabodojon]] || [[word:dabodoshon|dabodoshon]] || [[word:dabodokon|dabodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dabodothoro|dabodothoro]] || [[word:dabodojoro|dabodojoro]] || [[word:dabodoshoro|dabodoshoro]] || [[word:dabodokoro|dabodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
